context: Tests whether the agent builds a Klaviyo segment sync service using the correct package, API method, and batching, handles real-time unsubscribe events without waiting for nightly sync, and uses engagement tier signals (not just RFM) when determining deliverability-sensitive segment membership.

checklist.name: klaviyo-api package used
checklist.description: Code imports from 'klaviyo-api' package (not a different Klaviyo client such as 'klaviyo', 'klaviyo-node', or a raw HTTP call library)

checklist.name: KLAVIYO_PRIVATE_KEY env var
checklist.description: API key is sourced from the KLAVIYO_PRIVATE_KEY environment variable (not hardcoded or from a differently named variable)

checklist.name: Batch size of 1000
checklist.description: Profiles are sent to Klaviyo in batches of exactly 1000 per API call (not a different batch size)

checklist.name: subscribeProfiles API method
checklist.description: Uses profiles.subscribeProfiles() method with type 'profile-subscription-bulk-create-job' (not a list import or other method)

checklist.name: Segment property on profiles
checklist.description: Each profile sent to Klaviyo includes a segment property in its attributes to identify which segment it belongs to

checklist.name: Nightly sync scheduled
checklist.description: Solution includes a nightly scheduled job (cron, scheduler, or documentation of schedule) to sync all segments

checklist.name: Event-triggered sync
checklist.description: Sync is also triggered on key events (at minimum: order placed and/or unsubscribe/opt-out), not only on the nightly schedule

checklist.name: Unsubscribe processed immediately
checklist.description: Unsubscribe webhook handler processes the opt-out synchronously/immediately (updates the record right away) rather than deferring to the nightly batch

checklist.name: Engagement tier for deliverability
checklist.description: When building the audience for deliverability-sensitive or inbox-placement segments, the solution filters or prioritizes by engagementTier (champion or active) rather than exclusively by RFM segment

checklist.name: Behavioral tags in segmentation
checklist.description: Solution defines or uses at least one behavioral tag (e.g., 'sale-shopper', 'high-aov', 'frequent-buyer') as a segment criterion alongside RFM/engagement fields

checklist.name: marketingConsent and unsubscribedAt filter
checklist.description: All segment queries applied before syncing to Klaviyo filter to marketingConsent: true and unsubscribedAt: null
